message:
fix: replace ad-hoc convoy description parsing with typed ConvoyFields accessors (gt-re2y)

Add FormatConvoyFields and SetConvoyFields to match the MRFields pattern,
eliminating ZFC violations where convoy metadata (owner, notify, merge,
molecule) was embedded via manual string concatenation and parsed via
ad-hoc string prefix matching.

- convoy.go: Use SetConvoyFields for convoy creation, convoyMergeFromFields for reading
- sling_convoy.go: Use SetConvoyFields for batch/auto convoy creation
- Replace parseConvoyMergeStrategy with convoyMergeFromFields using ParseConvoyFields
